name: AfdxGetTokenData
title: AfdxGetTokenData
syntax: long AfdxGetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long offset, long length, byte buffer[] ); // form 1
description: This function copies a number of bytes from a token's data area to a destination buffer.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: handle of the message that has been created with AfdxInitPacket

return:
number of copied bytes or 0
With AfdxGetLastError you can check if the function has been processed successfully.
